_comment: Phase A live-validation fixture (spec v3.2.0). Seeds a deliberately under-tested change so the rubric grader returns needs_revision on iteration 1; the specialist iterates and the second grader pass returns satisfied. Built now, RUN later by the orchestrator at phase closeout via `make test-live FIXTURE=rubric-revision-loop`. This package.json mirrors node-react-auth's shape so the runFixture harness's existing infrastructure picks it up without special handling.
name: rubric-revision-loop-fixture
description: G8 Phase A live-validation fixture: deliberately under-tested helper drives the rubric needs_revision → satisfied loop.
